description: Hive recounts his origin to Daisy, describing how Kree Reapers abducted him as a primitive hunter for their experiments and how his transformation through Terrigenesis birthed the Inhumans. Daisy listens, trying to process the weight of their shared history and its relevance to their current mission. Hive prepares to reward the loyal Hydra circle with transformation, foreshadowing the dark plans ahead. Tension underlies Hive's assertion of control.

transcript.line: It was in that moment my world had changed forever. The Kree Reapers brought me back to their ship and began the experiment. I didn't know it then, but the Reapers were using their own Kree blood to transform my DNA. Once they changed what I was, the Reapers took the final step, fulfilling the promise of what I would become.
So that's how you became an Inhuman.

Myself and many others. Put through the Kree experiment thousands of years ago. These first Inhumans, they were your ancestors. Your ancestors started HYDRA. You fought to bring me back, yet are the only faithful to evade being captured after Gideon Malick's spineless betrayal. Well, the time has come for your reward.
Thank you, but what does that have to do with your story?
Isn't it obvious? We've been working hard to re-create the Kree experiment. And you're next.
You tried reaching out to any old contacts?
I just want to help. If I'm locked down on the base, at least let me do something.
The last time you helped wasn't helpful.
Alisha had answers. I was just trying to make her talk.
You threatened to torture her. How'd that work out?
I'm not going to apologize for trying to save someone I care about.
No. The rest of us have known her a lot longer. You really want to help? Stop trying.
